label.text: WARNING: FEDERAL AND STATE LAWS REQUIRE THAT YOU STATE THE MILEAGE IN CONNECTION WITH THE TRANSFER OF OWNERSHIP. FAILURE TO COMPLETE OR PROVIDING A FALSE STATEMENT MAY RESULT IN FINES AND/OR IMPRISONMENT.
The undersigned hereby assign and warrant title of this vehicle, subject to the liens described on the face of this certificate, to:
I state that the odometer now reads (NO TENTHS) miles:
[ ] Mileage is in excess of its mechanical limits.
[ ] Odometer reading is NOT the actual mileage. WARNING — ODOMETER DISCREPANCY.
[ ] EXEMPT — Vehicle is 20 model years or older and not required to have odometer disclosure.
[ ] GIFT — This vehicle is being transferred as a gift. No consideration was given.
Subscribed and sworn to (or affirmed) before me on this date by the person(s) named above.
The undersigned dealer hereby assigns and warrants title of this vehicle to:
I state that the odometer now reads (NO TENTHS) miles:
[ ] Mileage is in excess of its mechanical limits.
[ ] Odometer reading is NOT the actual mileage. WARNING — ODOMETER DISCREPANCY.
[ ] EXEMPT — Vehicle is 20 model years or older and not required to have odometer disclosure.
WE, THE BUYER AND SELLER, HEREBY CERTIFY THAT WE HAVE BOTH VIEWED THE ODOMETER.
The undersigned dealer hereby assigns and warrants title of this vehicle to:

[ ] Odometer reading is NOT the actual mileage. WARNING — ODOMETER DISCREPANCY.

WE, THE BUYER AND SELLER, HEREBY CERTIFY THAT WE HAVE BOTH VIEWED THE ODOMETER.
WARNING: ANY ALTERATION, FORGERY, OR FALSE STATEMENT ON THIS DOCUMENT IS A VIOLATION OF LAW AND MAY BE SUBJECT TO CRIMINAL PROSECUTION.
